summary: Assess, review, and propose product OKRs with the same rubric SVPG-trained coaches use. Homeric Product Coach wraps a managed MCP server that applies Marty Cagan's first principles and Christina Wodtke's Radical Focus mechanics to your team's quarterly goals.
longDescription:
Homeric Product Coach gives product leaders an expert-tuned second opinion on their OKRs without scheduling another consulting engagement.

**What it does:**
- **Assess** — Score an OKR set 0-100 across five dimensions (outcome orientation, measurability, leading indicators, objective quality, strategic alignment). Identify the 1-2 top issues holding the OKR back.
- **Review** — Detailed coaching feedback on a set of OKRs. Walks through each issue with citations to methodology.
- **Propose** — Generate methodology-grounded OKR proposals from strategy context or refine an existing set.

**How it works:**

The plugin registers an MCP connector pointing at `mcp.homeric.ai` and exposes three slash commands. The first time you invoke any command, a one-time OAuth flow grants the plugin access to the managed Homeric Skills service. Each invocation is methodology-applied (not paraphrased) — the model uses the live rubric the Homeric team maintains.

**Pricing:**

Free tier covers Assess + Review. Propose requires the Product Strategy capability pack ($199/seat/month). Manage seats at https://stratos.homeric.ai/billing.

screenshots.caption: /assess-okrs returns a scored assessment in seconds
/review-okrs walks through each weakness with methodology citations
